summary: Rare set featuring a Jack Straw after Help On The Way > Slipknot! and strong Smokestack Lightning, but recording details are unknown
review: The reviewer highlights an unusual second‑set order—Jack Straw appearing right after the Help On The Way > Slipknot! sequence—and notes a powerful opening with Smokestack Lightning. No information is given about the tape’s sound quality, so the recording assessment remains uncertain.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it praises the rare setlist but provides no recording details, leading to a moderate rating with low confidence

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Unusual sequencing with Jack Straw placed after the Help On The Way > Slipknot! segment, noted as a rare occurrence.

band_member_comments.Bob: Bob (referred to as Bobby) is praised for owning the Pig tune right from the start.
